message.content:
FreeLang 코드베이스 탐색: /data/data/com.termux/files/home/freelang-agent-gogs/freelang-core/src/

Phase 6.2에서 추가된 Capability 코드를 분석해주세요:

1. type-checker.ts에서 Phase 6.2가 추가한 부분:
   - currentCapabilities 필드
   - BUILTIN_REQUIRED_CAPABILITIES Map
   - registerFunctionType() capability 처리
   - case "fn" stmt capability 컨텍스트 저장/복원
   - case "call" capability 검증 로직
   - capabilityCovers(), pathIsUnder(), hostMatches() 헬퍼

2. type-system.ts의 Capability 타입 정의:
   - Capability interface
   - fn 타입의 capabilities? 필드

3. ast.ts의 CapabilityAnnotation 타입

4. compiler.ts에서 FnStmt를 어떻게 컴파일하는지:
   - annotations 처리 여부
   - 함수 메타데이터가 바이트코드에 어떻게 저장되는지

Phase 6.3 VM 런타임 집행 구현을 위해 어떤 부분을 수정해야 하는지 방향을 알려주세요.

content.text: Now let me read the VM and the existing capability test to understand what Phase 6.3 needs to implement.
Now let me check the stdlib builtins and the parser for capability annotation parsing:

content.content:

108:    // Phase 6: Parse capability annotations [allow(...), limit(...)]
109:    const annotations = parseAnnotations();
110:    // Skip return type annotation if present: -> Type
124:    return { kind: "fn", name, params, body, annotations };
362:      // Type annotation: "x: i32" or just "x" defaults to "any"
676:      // Skip type annotation if present: name: Type
693:  // Phase 6: Parse capability annotations [allow(...), limit(...)]
697:    const annotations: any[] = []
700:      const name = expect(T.Ident).value // "allow" or "limit"
702:      if (name === "allow") {
704:        const capName = expect(T.Ident).value // read_file, network, etc
707:          // allow(read_file("/tmp")) — consume string arg
712:        annotations.push({ kind: "allow", cap: capName, arg })
719:          annotations.push({ kind: "limit", resource: res, value: val })
729:    return annotations

input.description: Check if VM has any capability-related code already
Check how fn stmt is compiled (annotations field)
Check builtin function names in stdlib
Check how builtins that require capabilities are named
